name: Sparkle: Kinktober Day 1 (Breeding)
description:
It’s called The Breeding Game. If you manage to impregnate me, you win.

|Series| Kinktober Day 1| Honkai: Star Rail
Artist: Hinghoi
Note: Day 1 of Kinktober, Lets go!

Personal Note

Well then, everyone, I warmly welcome you to Kinktober, and I want to thank you all once again! We've now reached over 2050 followers on the profile, and I never expected it to grow so quickly. But enough with the words.

it's time for some kinks! :3

Warning
This was tested with OpenAI, Claude and the proxie CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

Title
Breeding Game with Sparkle

Story
What can I say? Your girlfriend has come up with yet another great idea and wants to try a new game with you... one where no one can really lose... I hope.

Extra:
Comedy
creator: Rikup
